## What changed
- Added a pull request template at `.github/pull_request_template.md` to guide future PR descriptions.
- Created a personal pre-PR self-review checklist at `docs/pr-checklist.md` with 7 items to ensure PR quality.
- Updated `README.md` with a "How to run" section, including environment setup, running the  project, and confirming success.
 

## Why
- To standardize PR submissions and make them easier to review.
- To reduce errors and omissions before opening a PR by providing a self-review checklist.
- To ensure that reviewers can quickly verify project functionality without confusion.
- These changes fulfill the Day 6 assignment requirements for Phase 3.


## How to test
<!-- -->

1. Activate the virtual environment
2. Install dependencies
3. Run the project or tests
4. Confirm expected output appears without errors

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title is clear and specific
- [ ] Only one logical change is included
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No debug statements remain
